news.headline: British conservatives shift towards right wing policy resembles trend seen across Europe.
Billy Biggs appointed President and CRO at TechnoMile, a VA-based company, to boost growth. Oct. 10, 2024.
news.summary: TechnoMile of TYSONS, Virginia has announced the addition of an experienced SaaS and GovCon expert to their leadership team in a move aimed at accelerating growth. The individual will bring their expertise in these fields to further enhance TechnoMile's position as a top provider of AI-enabled cloud solutions. This development was confirmed on October 10, 2024, and signifies TechnoMile's strategic focus on expanding its market presence.

news.headline: Autism Learning Partners expands with new ABA Therapy Center in Silver Spring, MD, focusing on treatment of autism.
news.summary: Autism Learning Partners (ALP), a prominent organization focusing on autism and developmental disability treatment, is excited to reveal its expansion within Maryland by establishing an ABA therapy center in Silver Spring. This move is part of ALP's strategy to enhance accessibility to its services and support individuals with autism in their development journey.

news.headline: New ezPaycheck software released for 2024-2025 offers restaurants payroll features at a discount. Available for free trial.
news.summary: A new version of ezPaycheck has recently been launched, tailored for the years 2024 and 2025. This updated combo version aims to assist restaurant owners and management in simplifying their payroll processes at a discounted rate. Interested individuals can explore this latest release at no charge or required credit card information by visiting halfpricesoft.com. The software is designed to streamline the payroll system efficiently. The announcement was made in Cincinnati on October 10, 2024.

news.headline: Global Blue reports +11% growth in Sales in Store in Continental Europe in September 2024 vs last year, driven by +14% increase in shoppers.
news.summary: In Signy, Switzerland, there has been significant growth in international shopping within Continental Europe. The Sales in Store growth rate saw a notable increase of +11% in September 2024 compared to the previous year. This growth was primarily driven by a rise of +14% in the number of shoppers. However, there was a slight decline of -2% in the average spend per shopper, which can be attributed to a general slowdown in inflation. Despite this, the overall performance remains strong. The positive trend was observed across various origin markets, indicating a promising outlook for the future.

news.headline: Domino's Pizza reports: 5.1% global sales growth, 3.0% in U.S., 0.8% internationally, 72 new stores opened, 5.0% increase in income from operations.
news.summary: Worldwide retail sales have risen by 5.1% when excluding the foreign currency impact. United States witnessed a 3.0% growth in same-store sales. Similarly, international same-store sales saw a growth of 0.8% when excluding foreign currency impact. Global net store growth stood at 72. Income from operations increased by 5.0%, with a notable exception of the $1.4 million exclusion.

news.headline: Infosys partners with zooplus to boost e-commerce through AI-led innovation, sets up global center in India.
news.summary: Infosys, a leading global provider of digital services and consulting, has launched a cutting-edge global capability center in Bengaluru, India, aimed at spearheading innovative AI-driven initiatives. The announcement was made on Oct. 10, 2024. This move is in line with Infosys' commitment to driving technological advancements and staying ahead in the industry. Infosys is listed on the National Stock Exchange (NSE: INFY), Bombay Stock Exchange (BSE: INFY), and New York Stock Exchange (NYSE: INFY).

news.headline: Nexdata presents data solutions for autonomous driving at AutoSens Europe 2024 in Barcelona, Spain. #AI #ADAS #AV
news.summary: Nexdata, a prominent worldwide company offering AI data services, is presenting its newest data solutions for Advanced Driver Assistance Systems (ADAS) and Autonomous Vehicles (AV) at AutoSens Europe 2024 in Barcelona, Spain. The event serves as a platform for industry professionals to explore the latest innovations and technologies in the automotive sector.

news.headline: Open Dental integrates Bola AI voice into practice management solution, boosting clinical efficiency. (Characters: 96)
news.summary: Dental practices utilizing Open Dental's management software now have the capability to enhance their clinical efficiency with Bola AI's voice-AI technology. Bola Technologies, Inc. (Bola AI), a prominent provider of Artificial Intelligence (AI) driven Voice solutions, announced the integration. This development, effective from October 10, 2024, in Orange County, California, enables seamless access to Bola AI's innovative technology. This collaboration aims to streamline operations for dental professionals, offering them improved tools and functionality for optimal performance.

news.headline: Franklin BSP Realty Trust, Inc. (NYSE: FBRT) will release Q3 2024 results on Nov 4, 2024 after NYSE closing, with conference call on Nov 5, 2024 at 9:00 a.m. ET.
news.summary: Franklin BSP Realty Trust, Inc. revealed that it is set to disclose its Q3 2024 outcomes on November 4, 2024, post the NYSE closing hours. A scheduled conference call with a live webcast is arranged for November 5, 2024, at 9:00 a.m. ET to deliberate on the financial outcomes. Further details about the call and webcast are available on the company's site at https://www.fbrtreit.com.

news.headline: Genesis Energy, L.P. (NYSE: GEL) declared a quarterly cash distribution of $0.165 per common unit, totaling $0.66 annually.
news.summary: Houston-based Genesis Energy, L.P. (NYSE: GEL) revealed that its Board of Directors approved a quarterly cash distribution for Genesis common unit holders and Class A Convertible Preferred unit holders, covering the quarter ending September 30, 2024. Common unit holders will receive $0.165 per common unit on a quarterly basis, totaling $0.66 annually per unit held. Preferred unit holders will also receive distributions.

news.headline: SPATCO Energy Solutions, backed by Kian Capital, acquires Hobby Electric and UST Services Corporation to expand services.
news.summary: Atlanta and Charlotte, N.C.-based SPATCO Energy Solutions, supported by Kian Capital, has successfully acquired Hobby Electric and UST Services Corporation. These acquisitions mark the second and third completed deals after the finalization of a single-asset continuation fund in July 2024. Hobby Electric is a top electrical services provider, while UST Services Corporation specializes in infrastructure services for the petroleum, environmental, and electric vehicle markets. SPATCO aims to enhance its offerings through these strategic acquisitions.

news.headline: 111 Inc. expands supply chain network with new fulfillment centers in South and Central China; company aiming to reshape healthcare industry.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, in Shanghai, 111, Inc. (NASDAQ: YI) revealed its plans as a top tech-enabled healthcare platform aiming to transform the healthcare industry in China by empowering both the upstream and downstream digitally. The company strives to reshape the value chain and enhance efficiency in delivering healthcare services.

news.headline: Orla Mining reports Q3 2024 with 43,788 oz of gold produced at Camino Rojo, leading to raised annual guidance of 130,000 to 140,000 oz. AISC guidance improved to $800 to $900 per oz.
news.summary: Orla Mining Ltd. provided an update on its Camino Rojo Oxide Mine's third-quarter performance, reporting 43,788 ounces of gold produced and 38,265 ounces sold. The mine mined a total of 4,782,386 tonnes with a strip ratio of 1.46. This led to an increase in annual production guidance to 130,000 to 140,000 ounces, up from the previous range of 120,000 to 130,000 ounces. The production outperformance was attributed to improved recoveries, higher grades, and increased tonnage processed. All-in sustaining cost guidance was revised to a range of $800 to $900 per ounce of gold sold.

news.headline: Liberty Gold reports preliminary feasibility study for Black Pine Oxide Gold Project in Idaho: 17-year mine life, 32% after-tax IRR, $327M initial capital expenditure.
news.summary: The mining operation involves an open pit with run-of-mine processing, omitting the crushing step. The project is estimated to have a construction duration of one year and requires an initial capital investment totaling $327 million.

news.headline: Global Control Flow Choke Market to reach US$1,069.5 million by 2034, with a CAGR of 3.5%; industry driven by oil and gas demand for innovative products, facing challenges in regulatory compliance and market stability. Manufacturers urged to adapt to changing trends, leverage new tech, and collaborations for sustained growth. North America and East Asia show significant market potential.
news.summary: The global Control Flow Choke Market is projected to reach US$ 758.2 million in 2024 and is expected to grow at a CAGR of 3.5% reaching over US$ 1,069.5 million by 2034. The steady growth is driven by the oil and gas sector's demand for advanced products to ensure efficiency and regulatory compliance. Key challenges include oil price fluctuations, slow adoption of Industry 4.0, and geopolitical tensions. Manufacturers are urged to explore emerging sectors like wind and solar energy projects, use digital integration for monitoring and maintenance, upgrade equipment with versatile materials, and prioritize collaborations for innovation and compliance. North America's market is forecasted to expand at a CAGR of 3.2% through 2034. The industry's future growth depends on adapting to market trends and leveraging new technologies to meet regulations and consumer needs.

news.headline: Krispy Kreme® offers FREE doughnuts to McDonald's lovers for the expansion to all local McDonald’s restaurants.
news.summary: Krispy Kreme has revealed a new promotion in Charlotte, N.C., to mark the launch of their doughnuts at select Chicagoland McDonald’s outlets from October 15. This is part of a phased introduction at McDonald's restaurants across the US, expected to be completed by the end of 2026. To commemorate this milestone, Krispy Kreme is offering a complimentary Original Glazed® doughnut to customers presenting a McDonald’s receipt from October 10-14. One doughnut per guest can be redeemed at participating outlets.

news.headline: High Tide will open its 185th Canna Cabana location, contributing to the company's growth in the cannabis retail sector.
news.summary: Calgary-based company High Tide Inc. (Nasdaq: HITI) (TSXV: HITI) (FSE: 2LYA) revealed on October 10, 2024, they intend to expand their Canna Cabana retail operations. High Tide aims to bring tangible benefits across all aspects of the cannabis industry.

news.headline: ICCS and CIR partner for info sharing on cosmetic safety, animal-free assessments. Collaboration for New Approach Methodologies and Next Generation Risk Assessments.
news.summary: A recent collaboration has been announced between the International Collaboration on Cosmetics Safety (ICCS) and the Cosmetic Ingredient Review (CIR). This partnership aims to enhance their endeavors in researching and promoting the sharing of data concerning cosmetic ingredient safety in connection to New Approach Methodologies (NAMs) and Next Generation Risk Assessments (NGRAs). ICCS, a worldwide project advocating for animal-free evaluations of cosmetics, and CIR, a research body...

news.headline: Lightspeed and 7shifts partner to improve operations for 62% struggling with labor management and 74% aiming to streamline.
news.summary: In response to industry challenges, a recent survey found that 62% of restaurant owners are facing difficulties managing labor while 74% are looking to streamline operations. To address these issues, Lightspeed Commerce Inc. (NYSE: LSPD) (TSX: LSPD) and 7shifts have announced an enhanced partnership. This collaboration aims to offer solutions and support to the struggling restaurateurs. This news comes out of Montreal on October 10, 2024.

news.headline: Cook County Treasurer Maria Pappas honors community leaders during Hispanic Heritage Month, presenting certificates on Oct. 15 at 3 p.m. in Chicago.
news.summary: Cook County Treasurer Maria Pappas will be honoring community leaders, activists, and entrepreneurs during a Hispanic Heritage Month celebration on Tuesday, October 15, 2024, at 3 p.m. in Cook County. Certificates of recognition will be presented to noteworthy individuals in the Hispanic community.

news.headline: Steel Dynamics sets science-based GHG targets for steel mills in line with Paris Agreement's 1.5°C scenario.
news.summary: Today, in Fort Wayne, Indiana, Steel Dynamics, Inc. revealed their newly established greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions intensity targets for their steel mills. The targets are certified and based on scientific findings. By adhering to the guidelines outlined in the Paris Agreement, specifically targeting the 1.5° C scenario, Steel Dynamics is taking proactive steps towards reducing their environmental impact. This move exemplifies the company's commitment to sustainability and aligning with global efforts to combat climate change.

news.headline: Raft named one of LinkedIn's Top Startups in Washington, D.C., among 10 companies recognized for rapid growth.
news.summary: A top defense technology firm has been acknowledged as one of the top 10 emerging companies for its rapid expansion and development of cutting-edge solutions. The company, named Raft, is focused on enhancing the capabilities of the U.S. military and government bodies. This recognition was revealed in Washington on October 10, 2024.

news.headline: AMCI Testing's latest evaluation found Tesla FSD (Supervised) unfit for self-driven taxi duty after 300 miles in NYC and over 1000 miles on the West Coast. LOS ANGELES, Oct. 10, 2024 /PRNewswire.
news.summary: In Los Angeles on October 10, 2024, concerns regarding the effectiveness of Tesla's FSD (Supervised) were raised after a thorough assessment covering more than 1000 miles on the West Coast. The results were found to be very troubling, prompting further investigation before the anticipated launch of their "ROBOTAXI" service.

news.headline: CleanSpark Achieves 30 EH/s operational hashrate & aims for 50 EH/s in 2025. Surge of 200% growth.
news.summary: CleanSpark Inc., a leading Bitcoin mining company in the United States, projects a substantial growth trajectory to reach 50 exahashes per second (EH/s) by 2025. In a recent announcement made on October 10, 2024, the company disclosed that it has successfully attained an operational hashrate of 30 EH/s, indicating a significant 200% surge in its hashrate.

news.headline: Over 14,000 healthcare devices and records exposed online, posing risks of data breaches and disruptions.
news.summary: Recent studies have revealed that exposed medical record systems and images can significantly raise the likelihood of unauthorized access, data breaches, and operational disruptions. The research, conducted in Ann Arbor, Michigan, on October 10, 2024, highlights the risks associated with such exposures. The findings emphasize the importance of safeguarding medical data, as even a small oversight can lead to severe consequences. It is crucial for organizations to prioritize the security of these systems to prevent potential breaches and protect sensitive information. Such lapses in security could result in compromising significant amounts of data, putting individuals' privacy at risk. This underscores the urgent need for heightened security measures to mitigate the vulnerabilities that could be exploited by malicious actors.

news.headline: Novonesis partners with Benchling, adopting platform for 1,500 scientists to drive collaboration. Oct 10, 2024.
news.summary: Novonesis, a leading biosolutions company, has selected Benchling as its digital R&D platform to enhance collaboration among its team of 1,500 scientists. This strategic move comes after a recent merger and aims to streamline research processes and facilitate communication across teams. The decision was announced on October 10, 2024, with Novonesis headquartered in Copenhagen, Denmark, and Benchling based in San Francisco. The partnership signifies a major investment in digital technology to drive innovation and efficiency within the organization.

news.headline: Lighthouse Wealth Tech Labs partners with Surge Ventures to boost wealth management innovation, forging new solutions for financial professionals.
news.summary: In a significant partnership aiming to revolutionize the wealth management sector, Lighthouse Wealth Tech Labs (Lighthouse), based in Denver, and Menlo Park, California, announced on October 10, 2024, a collaborative effort to pioneer new tech solutions. This venture is poised to drive scalable growth for financial professionals. The collaboration signifies a groundbreaking approach towards advancing the industry, with the potential to significantly impact the way wealth is managed. Stay tuned for more updates on this innovative partnership that is set to reshape the financial landscape.

news.headline: Delta Dental awards $980,000 for oral health diversity, funding six organizations supporting underrepresented kids.
news.summary: Six organizations have been selected as recipients of the 2024 Delta Dental Oral Health Diversity Fund in Washington. These organizations are focused on motivating school-aged children from underrepresented backgrounds to consider a future in oral health. The announcement was made on October 10, 2024, and this initiative is part of the Driving Greater Diversity campaign.

news.headline: West Pharmaceutical Services to host Q3 2024 conference call on Oct. 24, 2024; financial results to be released before market opening.
news.summary: West Pharmaceutical Services, Inc., a prominent provider of injectable drug administration solutions worldwide, revealed plans to unveil its third-quarter financial performance on October 24, 2024, before the market opens. As a leading company in this sector, West Pharmaceutical Services, Inc. (NYSE: WST) is highly anticipated by investors and analysts alike for insights into its recent financial standing. The market will be keenly observing key figures such as revenue, profits, and any strategic moves undertaken by the company, as these can significantly influence stock performance and market sentiment.

news.headline: SEASALT Europe hosts 1st Annual Meeting of sea salt producers in Ibiza to boost collaboration and sustainability in the sector at Ses Salines Natural Park, promoting conservation of unique ecosystems.
news.summary: In IBIZA, Spain, a significant event occurred at the sea saltworks of the Ses Salines Natural Park, known for its eco-friendly sea salt production and preservation of diverse ecosystems. These ecosystems, including wetlands, dunes, and underwater meadows, are crucial for the Mediterranean's health. The park serves as a fundamental indicator of sustainable practices, contributing to the region's biodiversity.

news.headline: Ripple enhances its Custody solution for crypto businesses with bank-grade security features, including transaction screening, HSM options, XRPL integration.
news.summary: Today in San Francisco, Ripple unveiled enhancements to Ripple Custody, offering advanced features to fintechs and crypto businesses. The upgrades include a transaction screening service integration, additional hardware security module (HSM) choices, XRPL integration for tokenizing Real World Assets (RWA), pre-configured policy frameworks, and. These improvements aim to provide the benefits of their bank-grade custody technology to a wider range of users.

news.headline: Cybersecurity startup watchTowr raises $19 million in Series A funding to redefine External Attack Surface Management.
news.summary: A cybersecurity startup, watchTowr, has secured a $19 million Series A funding round with Peak XV leading, alongside Prosus Ventures and Cercano Management. The investment aims to bolster the company's services in External Attack Surface Management. To achieve market leadership and global expansion, the funds will be utilized in enhancing go-to-market strategies as well as expanding research and engineering teams.

news.headline: Konami Gaming CEO Steve Sutherland honored with AGEM Memorial Award for Excellence in Gaming. #G2E2024
news.summary: In Las Vegas, Konami Gaming, Inc. extends congratulations to their President & CEO Steve Sutherland for being honored with the 2024 Memorial Award from the Association of Gaming Equipment Manufacturers. This recognition reflects Sutherland's outstanding contributions to the industry. #G2E2024.

news.headline: Ransomware attacks severity up 68% in 2024; average loss $353,000. Active Insurance provider, Coalition, reports.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Coalition, the first Active Insurance provider aiming to prevent digital risk, released its 2024 Cyber Claims Report: Mid-year Update. The report highlights emerging cyber trends affecting Coalition policyholders in the first half of 2024. One significant finding was a 68% surge in ransomware claims severity, leading to an average loss of $353,000. Despite a decrease in the frequency of ransomware attacks, their impact remains substantial.

news.headline: Cordoniq wins CyberSecurity Breakthrough Award for Secure Communications Solution of the Year. Honored among thousands of global nominations.
news.summary: A company based in Syracuse, New York, Cordoniq, a secure enterprise video collaboration platform, received the prestigious 2024 CyberSecurity Breakthrough Award for their outstanding performance as the "Secure Communications Solution of the Year." This recognition came after facing tough competition, as thousands of global nominations were reviewed by a panel of experts. Cordoniq was acknowledged for its exceptional secure collaboration solutions tailored for the evolving landscape of work. This accolade adds to Cordoniq’s previous recognition as one of just nine "Future of Work Product" honorees.

news.headline: KH Group plans to reform Indoor Group's operating model; change negotiations to begin soon.
Nokia Bell Labs partners with Vale to launch cognitive monitoring service for mining operations.
news.summary: Nokia Bell Labs and Vale have announced a collaboration to develop a cognitive monitoring service for network and mine operations. This innovative partnership aims to enhance operational efficiency and safety by implementing advanced monitoring technologies. This collaboration will leverage Nokia Bell Labs' expertise in network solutions and Vale's experience in mining operations. The service will provide real-time insights and analysis to improve productivity and decision-making. This initiative is set to revolutionize the industry by combining cutting-edge technology with mining expertise. Stay tuned for updates on this groundbreaking project.

news.headline: OWC to Showcase data storage and connectivity solutions at Broadcast India 2024, a premier event for the broadcast industry.
news.summary: In Woodstock, Illinois, Other World Computing (OWC®), a renowned provider of high-performance, secure, and eco-friendly tech solutions for Macs and PCs, revealed its participation in Broadcast India 2024. This event, a key platform for the broadcast, media, and entertainment sectors, will feature OWC showcasing its range of data storage and connectivity solutions. With top tech leaders gathered, the event will highlight the newest innovations in the industry, reinforcing OWC's commitment to enhancing and prolonging the life of technology.

news.headline: Nova Vision Acquisition Corp. extends business combination deadline to Nov. 10, 2024 with $6,301.56 deposit into Trust Account.
news.summary: Nova Vision Acquisition Corp., a special purpose acquisition company traded on NASDAQ as NOVV, received a deposit of $6,301.56 from its sponsor Nova Pulsar Holdings to extend its deadline for a business combination by one month, now set for November 10, 2024. The deposit amounts to approximately $0.03 per ordinary share issued during the initial public offering. The Company also issued a promissory note to the Sponsor, which is convertible into the Company's units at a price of $10.00 per unit upon the completion of a business combination. This extension offers the Company more time to finalize a business deal.

news.headline: EarnIn has enhanced its Balance Shield product to help customers avoid overdraft fees, with customizable alerts and transfers. The average consumer pays $35 in overdraft fees per incident.
news.summary: EarnIn, a leading on-demand pay company based in Palo Alto, California, has introduced new features for its Balance Shield product. This tool is designed to prevent customers from incurring unexpected fees such as overdraft fees and late payment charges on bills. The updated version offers customizable alerts for low balances and automated transfers, allowing users to better monitor and manage their bank accounts. On average, consumers pay approximately $35 for each overdraft fee. By utilizing Balance Shield, customers can safeguard their finances and gain more control over their day-to-day expenditures.

news.headline: SmartBear CEO Frank Roe will deliver keynote on AI and software quality at Sonatype virtual conference on October 10, 2024.
news.summary: In Somerville, Massachusetts, Frank Roe highlighted the important interplay between artificial intelligence (AI) and human intuition at the Sonatype virtual conference held on October 10, 2024. Roe delved into the essential balance required when leveraging AI technologies, emphasizing the significance of human insight in conjunction with advanced AI systems.

news.headline: Beam Global is expanding into the Ethiopian market with off-grid EV charging infrastructure - first in Africa.
news.summary: Beam Global is set to make its debut in the Ethiopian market by collaborating with an agent partner. This move marks the entrance of Africa’s first off-grid, renewably energized EV charging and energy resiliency infrastructure. The project aims to bolster sustainability efforts and improve access to clean energy in the region. This step underscores Beam Global's commitment to promoting eco-friendly practices.

news.headline: GSI Tech to release Q2 2025 results on October 24, 2024; to review results in conference call at 1:30 p.m. Pacific Time.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, GSI Technology, Inc. (Nasdaq: GSIT) based in Sunnyvale, California, a developer of the Gemini® Associative Processing Unit (APU) for AI and high-performance parallel computing (HPPC), and a key provider of high-performance memory solutions for networking, telecommunications, and military sectors, is set to disclose financial outcomes for its fiscal second quarter of 2025 that concluded on September 30, 2024. The announcement is scheduled after the market closes on October 24, 2024. Company management will host a conference call on October 24, 2024, at 1:30 p.m. Pacific time (4:30 p.m. Eastern Time) to analyze the second quarter financial results and provide insights into the third quarter of fiscal 2025.

news.headline: Atlas Energy Solutions announces commissioning of the Dune Express, a 42-mile electric conveyor system in Permian Basin.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, Atlas Energy Solutions Inc. revealed the initiation of the Dune Express project, a 42-mile fully electric conveyor system, aiming to revolutionize proppant logistics in the Permian Basin region. The system's commissioning started at the beginning of the week and is progressing as per schedule and budget. Commercial transportation of proppant into the Delaware Basin is set to commence in late Q4. The Company foresees improved plant operations as a result of this development. Atlas Energy Solutions Inc. is listed as AESI on the NYSE.

news.headline: Tesla Cybertruck owner wraps vehicle in Dogecoin design, combining two internet phenomena. Dogecoin created in 2013 as lighthearted Bitcoin alternative. Other Tesla wraps include military camouflage, political slogans.
news.summary: A Cybertruck owner of Tesla Inc (NYSE:TSLA) caught attention for wrapping their electric pickup in a Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) inspired design, featuring the popular cryptocurrency's Shiba Inu dog logo. Known as “Doge Tipping” on X social media platform, Chris shared with Tesla Owners Silicon Valley that the fusion of the Cybertruck and the “doge” meme motivated the unique vehicle wrap. This Dogecoin-themed Cybertruck is part of a growing trend of creatively wrapped Teslas, with designs ranging from military camouflage to political slogans. Dogecoin, introduced in 2013 as a playful alternative to Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC), continues to gain popularity for its meme-inspired branding.

news.headline: Glooko raises $100M in Series F funding, appoints Mike Alvarez as CEO, backed by Georgian, Health Catalyst Capital, Canaan.
news.summary: A digital health company, Glooko, Inc., based in Palo Alto, California, has recently revealed securing a $100 million Series F financing. Mike Alvarez has been appointed as the new Chief Executive Officer by the company’s Board of Directors. The funding, primarily driven by Georgian, with contributions from Health Catalyst Capital, Canaan, and various other investors and business partners, is aimed at bolstering Glooko’s operations and growth.

news.headline: Elis discloses total number of shares forming capital and voting rights as of Sept 30, 2024.
news.summary: Report on the number of shares comprising the capital and the total voting rights as of September 30, 2024.

news.headline: KPMG Switzerland partners with LatticeFlow AI to speed up AI risk assessments, enhance compliance for enterprises.
news.summary: In a recent development, KPMG Switzerland has joined forces with LatticeFlow AI in a strategic partnership aimed at enhancing AI risk assessments for enterprises. This collaboration seeks to expedite the identification and mitigation of risks related to AI technologies, especially concerning issues such as bias, inaccuracies, and legal responsibilities. With the enforcement of regulations like the EU AI Act, which came into effect this year, strict compliance deadlines have been established for high-risk AI applications. This partnership aims to aid businesses in navigating these challenges effectively.

news.headline: Tineco introduces TINECO PURE ONE A50S and TINECO PURE ONE STATION 5 in Italy at IFA 2024; offers exceptional suction power and intelligent LED lighting for tailored cleaning experience.
news.summary: Milan-based company Tineco, known for pioneering home cleaning products, introduces two cutting-edge vacuum cleaner models at IFA 2024: TINECO PURE ONE A50S and TINECO PURE ONE STATION 5. These models boast impressive suction capabilities, spacious tanks, and advanced LED lighting to enhance the cleaning process, catering to diverse household requirements. Notably, PURE ONE STATION 5 is equipped with a 3-in-1 smart station, offering added convenience and functionality. This launch signifies Tineco's commitment to revolutionizing home cleaning, with the aim to set new standards in the industry.
